mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT level_name FROM level_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND min_score <= #{totalScore} AND (max_score IS NULL OR max_score >= #{totalScore}) ORDER BY min_score DESC LIMIT 1 ), ( SELECT level_name FROM level_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY min_score ASC LIMIT 1 ) ) AS level_name
mapper.update: UPDATE manager_score_maintain SET total_score = #{totalScore}, level_name = #{levelName}, update_time = NOW() WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(m.total_score) DESC) AS rankNum, m.branch_name AS branchName, COUNT(m.manager_id) AS userCount, ROUND(SUM(m.total_score), 2) AS totalScore, ROUND(AVG(m.total_score), 2) AS avgScore FROM manager_score_maintain m WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 AND m.branch_name IS NOT NULL AND m.branch_name != '' GROUP BY m.branch_name ORDER BY totalScore DESC

SELECT m.manager_name AS managerName, m.branch_name AS branchName, m.total_score AS totalScore, l.level_name AS levelName FROM manager_score_maintain m LEFT JOIN level_info l ON m.level_name = l.level_name AND l.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.total_score DESC

SELECT l.level_name AS levelName, COUNT(m.manager_id) AS count FROM manager_score_maintain m LEFT JOIN level_info l ON m.level_name = l.level_name AND l.is_deleted = 0 WHERE m.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY l.level_name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT manager_no AS managerNo, SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 0 AND is_base = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS base_tag0, SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 1 AND is_base = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS base_tag1, SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 0 AND is_valid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS valid_tag0, SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 1 AND is_valid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS valid_tag1 FROM customer_detail WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY manager_no
SELECT basic_reduce AS basicReduce, valid_reduce AS validReduce FROM score_deduct_rule WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE manager_score_maintain SET rank_num = #{rankNum}, update_time = NOW() WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE customer_info SET account_status = '1' WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND account_status != '1'
mapper.select: SELECT customer_no AS customerNo, manager_id AS managerId, group_code AS groupCode, customer_name AS customerName, tag FROM customer_info WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND account_status = '1'
SELECT cust_no AS customerNo, manager_no AS managerId, is_base AS isBase, is_valid AS isValid, tag_type AS tagType FROM customer_detail WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT group_name AS groupName, score FROM customer_group_category WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT id AS shareId, emp_no AS managerId, title AS shareTitle FROM experience_share WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND draft_status = 1
SELECT item_name AS itemName, points FROM score_add_rule WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(score), 0) AS totalScore FROM manager_score_change WHERE manager_id = #{managerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE manager_score_maintain m JOIN ( SELECT manager_id, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_score DESC) AS new_rank FROM manager_score_maintain WHERE is_deleted = 0 ) r ON m.manager_id = r.manager_id SET m.rank_num = r.new_rank WHERE m.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT customer_no AS customerNo, customer_name AS customerName, manager_id AS managerId, product AS productName FROM customer_info WHERE account_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND product IS NOT NULL AND product != ''

SELECT manager_no AS managerId, (SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 1 AND is_base = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 0 AND is_base = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS baseIncrement, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 1 AND is_base = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 0 AND is_base = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) DESC) AS rank_num FROM customer_detail WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY manager_no HAVING baseIncrement > 0

SELECT manager_no AS managerId, (SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 1 AND is_valid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 0 AND is_valid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS validIncrement, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 1 AND is_valid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN tag_type = 0 AND is_valid = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) DESC) AS rank_num FROM customer_detail WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY manager_no HAVING validIncrement > 0

SELECT id, manager_id AS managerId, manager_name AS managerName, branch_name AS branchName, treasure_name AS treasureName, treasure_desc AS treasureDesc, score, customer_no AS customerNo, customer_name AS customerName, share_id AS shareId, share_title AS shareTitle, trigger_time AS triggerTime, status, remark FROM manager_score_change ORDER BY trigger_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, manager_id AS managerId, manager_name AS managerName, branch_name AS branchName, treasure_name AS treasureName, treasure_desc AS treasureDesc, score, customer_no AS customerNo, customer_name AS customerName, share_id AS shareId, share_title AS shareTitle, trigger_time AS triggerTime, status, remark FROM manager_score_change WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY trigger_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM manager_score_change

SELECT manager_id AS managerId, manager_name AS managerName, branch_name AS branchName, total_score AS totalScore, level_name AS levelName, rank_num AS rankNum FROM manager_score_maintain WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY total_score DESC
